backend/main.mo: Main actor defining EmployeeRecord and BenefitScheme types with functions to add employees/schemes, validate eligibility based on department/designation/salary/status, and query employee/scheme data.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old citizen-based eligibility system (with CitizenID, income tiers, region codes) to new employee-based benefit system, initializing empty employee and benefit scheme maps.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three main features: CSV employee dataset generation, TransactionForm update for employee records, and TransactionHistory update for employee-specific details.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON summary of frontend files including App.tsx (tab navigation), TransactionForm (benefit request with validation), TransactionHistory (request viewer), AdminDashboard (system controls), and 500-record employee CSV dataset.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS base styles with OKLCH color system defining CSS variables for light/dark themes with trust-focused blue palette and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with Employee Benefits Gateway title, meta description, and root div for React mounting.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root React component with Layout wrapper and tabbed interface switching between benefit processing (TransactionForm + TransactionHistory) and admin dashboard views.
frontend/src/components/AdminDashboard.t: Admin control panel displaying system status (Active/Paused/Frozen), emergency pause button, budget monitoring with progress bar, transaction counts, and active security features list.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Application layout component with header (Employee Benefits Gateway branding, Shield/Lock icons, Sequential Validation badge) and footer (copyright, caffeine.ai attribution).
React form component for submitting employee benefit requests with real-time validation gate visualization (eligibility, budget, frequency) and approval/rejection display using ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/components/TransactionHisto: Displays a scrollable list of recent benefit transactions with mock data, showing employee details, benefit type, amount, and approval/rejection status with reasons.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages an ICP backend actor instance, handling both authenticated (with Internet Identity) and anonymous actor creation with automatic query invalidation on identity changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: React context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login/logout flow, identity persistence, and authentication status with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Placeholder React Query hooks for system status and transaction history that return mock data until backend methods are implemented.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables defining a trust-focused color palette (deep blue primary, teal accent) for both light and dark themes using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query and Internet Identity providers, then renders the root App component.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind configuration extending the default theme with custom colors (using OKLCH), fonts (Inter, JetBrains Mono), security-themed shadows, and custom animations for accordions and pulse effects.
project_state.json: Project state file tracking Jan-Dhan Gateway fraud-proof benefit distribution system with sequential validation, hash-linked ledger, three-key verification, and CSV dataset integration. Documents architectural decisions including SHA-256 hashing, three-gate validation (eligibility→budget→frequency), system auto-lock mechanisms, and existing features for admin dashboard, transaction processing UI, and CSV dataset management.
